description_long: This jewelry piece features a large, faceted, dark gemstone or crystal as its central element, cut in a geometric, almost hexagonal shape. Encircling the base of the gemstone is a thick, metallic chain rendered in a deep bronze or copper hue, giving the piece a bold and industrial aesthetic. On one side, an embedded, realistic blue and white eyeball motif is set into the chain, adding a striking and surreal focal point. The overall design is heavy and dramatic, with the chain links tightly wrapped around the base, suggesting both strength and a sense of being bound. The surface of the gemstone is smooth and highly polished, reflecting light subtly, while the chain has a slightly glossier metallic finish. The combination of the dark stone, metallic chain, and the eye motif creates a unique, avant-garde statement piece.
description: A large, faceted dark gemstone is encircled by a thick bronze chain, featuring a striking blue eye motif set into the chain. The design is bold, industrial, and surreal.
description_view_0: The dark faceted gemstone dominates the view, with the bronze chain visible at the base but the eye motif is not visible from this angle.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the blue and white eye motif embedded in the chain, making it the focal point of this perspective.
description_view_2: The gemstone and chain are visible, but the eye motif is partially obscured, offering a side profile of the piece.
description_view_3: The back of the jewelry shows only the gemstone and chain, with no visible eye motif or additional features.
